## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
What should happen? Be specific about the UI, behavior, and data.

## Alternative Solutions
What alternatives have you considered?

## Workstream
- [ ] WS-1: Design System
- [ ] WS-2: Component Library
- [ ] WS-3: Data Layer
- [ ] WS-4: Pages & Features
- [ ] WS-5: AI UX & Agents
- [ ] WS-6: Infrastructure

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Impact
- Pages affected: [list page routes]
- Components affected: [list components]
- Data tables affected: [list supabase tables]

Attach Figma links or screenshots.
